scene.description: A photorealistic wide daytime exterior of a 3500 square foot neglected residential common-space entry area at the corner of Baseline Road and Anna Thomas Parkway in Lafayette Colorado. Compacted brown soil with patchy dead grass, deteriorated landscape fabric peeling up, scattered debris and dry weeds. Stone-pillar monument sign with Anna's Farm horse logo center-right. Large bare deciduous tree center. Green utility transformer boxes left side. Crosswalk pole with yellow Caution sign at curb. Concrete sidewalk curves around the corner. Colorful townhomes visible in background. Colorado Front Range suburban neighborhood, early spring.
scene.weather: partly cloudy Colorado sky, cumulus clouds
scene.location: Anna Thomas Pkwy and Baseline Rd, Lafayette, Colorado

materials.type: compacted brown soil, patchy dead grass, deteriorated landscape fabric, debris
stone pillar base with oval horse logo sign
green transformer box, white telecom pedestal
